"use client"; import { Sheet, SheetClose, SheetContent, SheetDescription, SheetFooter, SheetHeader, SheetTitle, SheetTrigger, } from "@/components/ui/sheet"; import { Button } from "@/components/ui/button"; import { Input } from "@/components/ui/input"; import { Label } from "@/components/ui/label"; const data = { "title": "Edit profile", "description": "Make changes to your profile here. Click save when you're done.", "nameLabel": "Name", "nameDefault": "John Doe", "usernameLabel": "Username", "usernameDefault": "@johndoe", "saveLabel": "Save changes" }; export default function SheetRightExample() { return ( {data.title} {data.description}
); }
